example.zh-CN: glua.codec.urlDecode(text)

description.en: MD5, SHA, and HMAC namespace. MD5/SHA-1 are provided only for legacy compatibility.
description.zh-CN: MD5、SHA 和 HMAC 摘要命名空间；MD5/SHA-1 仅用于旧协议兼容。

example.en: glua.hash
example.zh-CN: glua.hash

description.en: Returns a lowercase MD5 hex digest for compatibility only.
description.zh-CN: 返回 MD5 小写十六进制摘要，仅用于兼容校验。

example.en: glua.hash.md5(data)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.md5(data)

description.en: Returns a lowercase SHA-1 hex digest for compatibility only.
description.zh-CN: 返回 SHA-1 小写十六进制摘要，仅用于兼容校验。

example.en: glua.hash.sha1(data)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.sha1(data)

description.en: Returns a lowercase SHA-256 hex digest.
description.zh-CN: 返回 SHA-256 小写十六进制摘要。

example.en: glua.hash.sha256(data)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.sha256(data)

description.en: Returns a lowercase SHA-512 hex digest.
description.zh-CN: 返回 SHA-512 小写十六进制摘要。

example.en: glua.hash.sha512(data)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.sha512(data)

returns.zh-CN: 返回：小写十六进制 HMAC。

description.en: Computes HMAC using md5, sha1, sha256, or sha512; prefer sha256/sha512 for new designs.
description.zh-CN: 计算 HMAC，algorithm 支持 md5、sha1、sha256、sha512；新设计推荐 sha256 或 sha512。

example.en: glua.hash.hmac(algorithm, key, data)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.hmac(algorithm, key, data)

description.en: Safe regular-expression namespace backed by Go RE2; backtracking and backreferences are unsupported.
description.zh-CN: 基于 Go RE2 的安全正则命名空间，不支持回溯和反向引用。

example.en: glua.regex
example.zh-CN: glua.regex

description.en: Reports whether an RE2 pattern matches anywhere in text.
description.zh-CN: 判断 RE2 pattern 是否匹配文本任意位置。

example.en: glua.regex.match(pattern, text)
example.zh-CN: glua.regex.match(pattern, text)

description.en: Returns 1-based byte start/end for the first match, or nil.
description.zh-CN: 返回首个匹配的 1-based 字节 start/end；未匹配返回 nil。

example.en: glua.regex.find(pattern, text [, init])
example.zh-CN: glua.regex.find(pattern, text [, init])

description.en: Returns match objects containing text, start, end, and groups.
description.zh-CN: 返回匹配对象数组，每项包含 text、start、end、groups。

example.en: glua.regex.findAll(pattern, text [, limit])
example.zh-CN: glua.regex.findAll(pattern, text [, limit])

description.en: Replaces matches using RE2 `$1`/`${name}` expansion with an optional limit.
description.zh-CN: 按 RE2 `$1`/`${name}` 语法替换匹配，可限制替换次数。

example.en: glua.regex.replace(pattern, text, replacement [, limit])
example.zh-CN: glua.regex.replace(pattern, text, replacement [, limit])

description.en: Splits text by an RE2 pattern and returns an explicit array.
description.zh-CN: 按 RE2 pattern 分割文本并返回显式数组。

example.en: glua.regex.split(pattern, text [, limit])
example.zh-CN: glua.regex.split(pattern, text [, limit])

description.en: UUID v4 generation, validation, and normalization namespace.
description.zh-CN: UUID v4 生成、校验和规范化命名空间。

example.en: glua.uuid
example.zh-CN: glua.uuid

description.en: Generates an RFC 4122 UUID v4 using the system cryptographic random source.
description.zh-CN: 使用系统安全随机源生成 RFC 4122 UUID v4。

example.en: glua.uuid.v4()
example.zh-CN: glua.uuid.v4()

description.en: Validates canonical 36-character or compact 32-character UUID text.
description.zh-CN: 校验 36 字符 canonical 或 32 字符无连字符 UUID。

example.en: glua.uuid.validate(text)
example.zh-CN: glua.uuid.validate(text)

returns.zh-CN: 返回：UUID 字符串或 nil。

description.en: Normalizes valid UUID text to lowercase canonical form, or returns nil.
description.zh-CN: 把合法 UUID 规范为小写 canonical 文本，非法时返回 nil。

example.en: glua.uuid.parse(text)
example.zh-CN: glua.uuid.parse(text)

description.en: Resource-limited in-memory ZIP namespace with no host filesystem access.
description.zh-CN: 受资源限制的内存 ZIP 压缩/解压命名空间，不访问宿主文件系统。

example.en: glua.zip
example.zh-CN: glua.zip

returns.zh-CN: 返回：ZIP 二进制字符串。

description.en: Compresses a filename-to-binary-string object into ZIP, rejecting unsafe paths and enforcing size limits.
description.zh-CN: 把文件名到二进制字符串的对象压缩为 ZIP；拒绝危险路径并限制条目、文件、总输入和归档大小。

example.en: glua.zip.compress(entries [, options])
example.zh-CN: glua.zip.compress(entries [, options])

description.en: Decompresses ZIP into a file map, rejecting traversal, duplicate names, and oversized content.
description.zh-CN: 把 ZIP 二进制解压为文件映射；拒绝路径穿越、重复名称和超限内容。

example.en: glua.zip.decompress(archive [, options])
example.zh-CN: glua.zip.decompress(archive [, options])

description.en: Deterministic lightweight table-schema namespace without remote references.
description.zh-CN: 确定性的轻量 table schema 校验命名空间，不支持远程引用。

example.en: glua.schema
example.zh-CN: glua.schema

returns.en: returns: true, or false, message, path.

description.en: Validates type, enum, properties, required, additionalProperties, items, lengths, ranges, and RE2 patterns. Data mismatches return false/message/path; invalid schemas raise.
description.zh-CN: 校验 type、enum、properties、required、additionalProperties、items、长度、范围和 RE2 pattern。数据失败返回 false、message、path，非法 schema 抛错。

example.en: glua.schema.validate(value, schema)
example.zh-CN: glua.schema.validate(value, schema)

description.en: Returns the original value on success and raises a Lua error with a `$` data path on failure.
description.zh-CN: 校验成功返回原值，失败抛出带 `$` 数据路径的 Lua error。

example.en: glua.schema.assert(value, schema)
example.zh-CN: glua.schema.assert(value, schema)

description.en: Host-platform lexical path operations with no filesystem access.
description.zh-CN: 只进行宿主平台词法路径运算且不访问文件系统的命名空间。

example.en: glua.path
example.zh-CN: glua.path

description.en: Joins and cleans any number of path elements.
description.zh-CN: 连接并清理任意数量的路径片段。

example.en: glua.path.join(...)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.join(...)

description.en: Returns the shortest equivalent lexical path without checking the target.
description.zh-CN: 返回最短等价词法路径，不检查目标。

example.en: glua.path.clean(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.clean(path)

returns.zh-CN: 返回：文件名或末尾元素。

description.en: Returns the last path element.
description.zh-CN: 返回最后一个路径元素。

example.en: glua.path.base(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.base(path)

description.en: Returns the directory portion of a path.
description.zh-CN: 返回路径的目录部分。

example.en: glua.path.dir(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.dir(path)

returns.zh-CN: 返回：扩展名或空字符串。

description.en: Returns the final extension including its leading dot.
description.zh-CN: 返回包含前导点的扩展名。

example.en: glua.path.ext(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.ext(path)

description.en: Reports whether a path is absolute on the host platform.
description.zh-CN: 按宿主平台规则判断绝对路径。

example.en: glua.path.isAbs(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.isAbs(path)

description.en: Computes target relative to base and raises when the result cannot be represented across volumes.
description.zh-CN: 计算 target 相对于 base 的词法路径，无法跨卷表达时抛错。

example.en: glua.path.rel(base, target)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.rel(base, target)

description.en: Splits a path into directory and final element, retaining the directory separator.
description.zh-CN: 拆分目录和最后一个元素，目录保留尾部分隔符。

example.en: glua.path.split(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.split(path)

description.en: Returns a Windows drive or UNC volume name and usually empty text elsewhere.
description.zh-CN: 返回 Windows 驱动器或 UNC 卷名，其他平台通常为空。

example.en: glua.path.volume(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.volume(path)

description.en: Converts host separators to forward slashes.
description.zh-CN: 把宿主平台分隔符转换为正斜杠。

example.en: glua.path.toSlash(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.toSlash(path)

description.en: Converts forward slashes to host separators.
description.zh-CN: 把正斜杠转换为宿主平台分隔符。

example.en: glua.path.fromSlash(path)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.fromSlash(path)

description.en: Matches a name using host path-pattern rules and raises on malformed patterns.
description.zh-CN: 按宿主平台路径模式匹配名称，非法模式抛错。

example.en: glua.path.match(pattern, name)
example.zh-CN: glua.path.match(pattern, name)

description.en: Current host directory separator.
description.zh-CN: 当前宿主平台目录分隔符。

example.en: glua.path.separator
example.zh-CN: glua.path.separator

description.en: Current host path-list separator.
description.zh-CN: 当前宿主平台路径列表分隔符。

example.en: glua.path.listSeparator
example.zh-CN: glua.path.listSeparator

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Reads a readable io file from its current position to EOF and encodes Base64 without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置读取到 EOF 并编码为 Base64；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.codec.base64EncodeFile(assert(io.open('data.bin', 'rb')))
example.zh-CN: glua.codec.base64EncodeFile(assert(io.open('data.bin', 'rb')))

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Reads Base64 text from a readable io file at its current position and decodes it without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置读取 Base64 文本并解码；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.codec.base64DecodeFile(file [, urlSafe])
example.zh-CN: glua.codec.base64DecodeFile(file [, urlSafe])

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Reads a readable io file from its current position to EOF and encodes lowercase hexadecimal without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置读取到 EOF 并编码为小写十六进制；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.codec.hexEncodeFile(file)
example.zh-CN: glua.codec.hexEncodeFile(file)

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Reads and decodes hexadecimal from a readable io file at its current position without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置读取并解码十六进制；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.codec.hexDecodeFile(file)
example.zh-CN: glua.codec.hexDecodeFile(file)

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Streams MD5 from a readable io file at its current position for compatibility only, without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置流式计算 MD5，仅用于兼容；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.hash.md5File(file)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.md5File(file)

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Streams SHA-1 from a readable io file at its current position for compatibility only, without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置流式计算 SHA-1，仅用于兼容；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.hash.sha1File(file)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.sha1File(file)

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Streams SHA-256 from a readable io file at its current position without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置流式计算 SHA-256；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.hash.sha256File(assert(io.open('data.bin', 'rb')))
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.sha256File(assert(io.open('data.bin', 'rb')))

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Streams SHA-512 from a readable io file at its current position without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置流式计算 SHA-512；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.hash.sha512File(file)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.sha512File(file)

returns.zh-CN: 返回：小写十六进制 HMAC。

en: file: readable file returned by io.open

description.en: Streams HMAC from a readable io file at its current position without seeking or closing it.
description.zh-CN: 从可读 io file 当前位置流式计算 HMAC；不 seek 也不关闭文件。

example.en: glua.hash.hmacFile(algorithm, key, file)
example.zh-CN: glua.hash.hmacFile(algorithm, key, file)
